body:
Cross-ticket overlap detection. The plan-review gate reviews one ticket in isolation and never detects semantic overlap or duplication across the store. We need a store-wide overlap detector.

The plan-review gate currently reviews one ticket's plan in isolation. It does not detect semantic overlap or duplication between separate tickets.
